/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-S -Wl,-x -Wl,-dead_strip -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libcgal_gdextension.dylib -install_name @rpath/libcgal_gdextension.dylib CMakeFiles/cgal_gdextension.dir/src/cgal_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cgal_gdextension.dir/src/register_types.cpp.o  bin/libgodot-cpp.macos.template_debug.arm64.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmpxx.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libmpfr.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib
